items.title: Visa is quietly building stablecoins into mainstream payment plumbing without you knowing
items.whyYouShouldCare: Visa's integration of stablecoins into payment systems could enhance liquidity and accessibility for Solana-based projects, potentially driving increased usage within its ecosystem.

items.title: Wasabi Protocol drained of $4.5 million in apparent admin key compromise
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $4.5 million loss at Wasabi Protocol highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi governance, which could impact investor confidence and liquidity in Solana's DeFi landscape.

items.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collapse of Carrot due to the Drift exploit underscores the risks in DeFi, which may deter participation and affect the overall health of Solana's ecosystem.
